title: Pricing
lead: LetterLab is currently focused on building a reliable writing experience. Pricing is presented here as a transparent plan outline and may evolve as features mature.

seo.title: Pricing | LetterLab
seo.description: Transparent plan outline for LetterLab writing tools.

body: This page describes intended plans. If payments are not enabled in this build, the UI must never imply that a purchase is possible.

items.title: Is payment available right now?
body: If payments are not enabled, there is nothing to buy. This page exists for transparency and future readiness.

items.title: What does "Pro" mean?
body: Pro is meant for heavy usage and advanced controls. It should never unlock dark patterns or hide core writing quality behind a paywall.

items.title: Will pricing change?
body: Yes. As LetterLab evolves, pricing may change. Any changes should be communicated in Updates with clear dates.
